query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS serviceItems;

CREATE TABLE serviceItems (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  itemKey VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  title VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  type VARCHAR(20),
  mediaUrl VARCHAR(500),
  fileKey VARCHAR(500),
  uploadedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT INTO serviceItems (itemKey, title, description, type) VALUES
('classy_live_filming', 'Classy live filming', '', NULL),
('profile_music_video', 'Profile-Music video', '', NULL),
('planned_shooting', 'Planned shooting', '', NULL);
